message:
chore(gitignore): add macOS .DS_Store and ._* patterns

macOS Finder creates .DS_Store files throughout the tree —
never belongs in git.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -172,4 +172,8 @@ venv/
 emoji_cache.json
 # tournament_results
 # output_results_for_each_round_and_model
-# metrics/test_metrics.json
\ No newline at end of file
+# metrics/test_metrics.json
+
+# macOS
+.DS_Store
+._*
\ No newline at end of file
